overall.description: Game engine footage from a bus simulator showing a first-person driver perspective navigating through rainy urban streets at dusk. The bus drives through wet city roads, stops at a bus stop to pick up passengers, and continues through varying urban environments from residential areas to modern commercial districts.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet tree-lined avenue with pedestrian crossing

events.description: pedestrian crosses the road in front of the bus, causing the bus to brake
brief passage through darker area under heavy tree cover or overpass

agents.ego_description: driving the bus through heavy rain with active windshield wipers, slowing down for a pedestrian crossing the street

notable_agents.action: crossing the wet street in front of the bus during heavy rainfall

entered.detail: rain-soaked multi-lane road with water reflections and visible lane markings
row of autumn trees lining the left side of the avenue
row of trees along the right sidewalk creating canopy effect
vehicle headlights visible through the rain in the opposite lane

segments.scene_description: The bus drives through a heavy downpour on a tree-lined urban avenue. Raindrops streak across the windshield as the wipers move rapidly. A pedestrian suddenly crosses in front of the bus, causing the driver to brake. The lighting briefly darkens as the bus passes under dense tree cover or a short underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban residential street with apartment buildings

events.description: environment transitions from tree-lined avenue to denser residential area with multi-story apartment blocks
navigating past parked cars and oncoming traffic in the rain

agents.ego_description: navigating the bus through residential streets, passing parked vehicles and maintaining speed through moderate traffic

entered.detail: multi-story brick apartment blocks with balconies lining the right side of the street
continuous row of parked vehicles along the right curb
high-rise residential tower visible in the distance through the rain

segments.scene_description: The bus continues through a residential district with multi-story apartment buildings lining the right side. Parked cars fill the curb lane while the bus navigates through moderate oncoming traffic. The trees give way to urban architecture as the vehicle approaches a bus stop in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop with shelter and waiting passengers

events.description: bus signals and begins pulling over to the right to approach the bus stop
bus comes to a complete stop at the bus stop, doors open to allow passenger boarding

agents.ego_description: pulling over to the bus stop curb and stopping to pick up waiting passengers in the rain

notable_agents.action: group of people standing under the bus shelter waiting to board the bus

entered.detail: covered bus stop with glass panels and bench where passengers are waiting
distinctive purple sedan parked immediately after the bus stop

segments.scene_description: The bus pulls over to a sheltered bus stop where several passengers are waiting in the rain. After coming to a stop, the doors open to allow boarding. A distinctive purple sedan is parked just past the stop, and residential buildings continue along the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road departing bus stop

events.description: bus closes doors and accelerates to merge back into the traffic lane
overtaking parked cars while navigating through oncoming traffic

agents.ego_description: accelerating away from the bus stop and merging back into the flow of traffic on the wet road

entered.detail: steady stream of vehicles approaching with headlights on in the opposite lane

segments.scene_description: After picking up passengers, the bus accelerates and merges back into the traffic lane. The vehicle continues along the wet residential street, passing rows of parked cars while navigating around oncoming traffic. The windshield wipers maintain a steady rhythm against the persistent rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with modern commercial buildings

events.description: road widens significantly and environment shifts to modern commercial district with glass buildings
approaching traffic lights at large intersection, preparing to navigate the crossing

agents.ego_description: driving on a wide multi-lane arterial road approaching a major intersection with modern urban architecture

entered.detail: contemporary glass and steel office complex with reflective windows
large modern commercial buildings lining the right side of the wide avenue
overhead traffic signal gantry spanning the wide intersection ahead
metal tram or light rail tracks embedded in the center of the road surface

segments.scene_description: The bus enters a wide modern boulevard with tram tracks embedded in the road. The architecture shifts from residential to commercial, with large glass office buildings on both sides. The vehicle approaches a major intersection with overhead traffic lights, navigating through the expansive urban crossing as the rain continues to fall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver navigating a rainy city, transitioning from a tree-lined avenue into a modern commercial district. It begins in a heavy downpour where raindrops streak across the windshield and wipers move rapidly, momentarily darkening as the bus passes under dense tree cover and brakes for a crossing pedestrian. As the greenery gives way to urban architecture, the camera moves through a residential district lined with apartment buildings and parked cars before pulling over at a sheltered bus stop to board waiting passengers. After merging back into the flow of traffic past a purple sedan, the vehicle continues along the wet residential street with the wipers maintaining a steady rhythm. The scene finally expands as the bus enters a wide modern boulevard with embedded tram tracks, shifting from residential housing to large glass office buildings and a major intersection with overhead traffic lights.
